meals.name: Soft-Boiled Egg with Whole-Grain Sourdough, Feta & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: soft-boiled egg in a white ceramic cup, halved sourdough toast on the side with crumbled white feta cheese, fresh strawberries scattered on a blue plate, natural morning light
prep_steps: Boil eggs to soft stage (6 min), transfer to ice bath, peel and store in sealed container
day_of_steps: Toast 2 slices sourdough (Diego) or 1.5 slices (Diana)
Place soft-boiled egg in egg cup
Crumble 30g (Diego) or 25g (Diana) feta over toast
Arrange fresh strawberries on plate

meals.name: Almonds & Apple
meals.image_prompt: handful of raw almonds next to a fresh red apple on a white plate, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw almonds into bowl
Slice 1 medium apple, serve alongside almonds

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: plate with golden-grilled chicken breast, colourful roasted bell peppers and zucchini, fluffy quinoa pilaf, drizzled with olive oil and fresh thyme, wooden table, warm natural light
prep_steps: Season 650g chicken breast with dried oregano, lemon juice, garlic, salt, pepper
Grill or bake chicken at 200°C for 18 min until cooked through, cool and portion
Chop bell peppers, zucchini, carrots; toss with 1.5 tbsp olive oil, paprika, thyme
Roast vegetables at 200°C for 22 min until tender
Cook 150g dry quinoa in 300ml vegetable stock, cool and portion
day_of_steps: Reheat 180g (Diego) or 140g (Diana) chicken in oven 180°C for 4 min
Reheat roasted vegetables 180°C for 3 min
Portion cooked quinoa into bowls
Arrange chicken and vegetables on top, drizzle 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) olive oil

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: white bowl of creamy Greek yogurt topped with toasted walnuts and fresh blueberries, served on a light grey linen napkin, soft afternoon light
day_of_steps: Spoon 180g (Diego) or 140g (Diana) Greek yogurt into bowl
Top with 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) raw walnuts and 60g (Diego) or 50g (Diana) blueberries

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Green Beans, Mushrooms & New Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: baked white fish fillet topped with lemon slices, surrounded by steamed green beans and roasted mushrooms, small boiled new potatoes with herbs, blue ceramic plate, candlelit table
prep_steps: Boil 400g new potatoes with skin until tender (18 min), cool and portion
Steam 500g green beans for 8 min until tender-crisp, cool and portion
Sauté 300g mushrooms in 1 tbsp olive oil with garlic and thyme for 6 min, cool and portion
day_of_steps: Place 160g (Diego) or 130g (Diana) white fish fillet on parchment paper
Season with lemon juice, salt, pepper, thyme; bake at 180°C for 10 min
Reheat potatoes, green beans, mushrooms together 180°C for 3 min
Plate fish with vegetables, drizzle 0.75 tsp (Diego) or 0.5 tsp (Diana) olive oil

meals.name: Smoked Salmon on Rye with Cream Cheese & Kiwi
meals.image_prompt: two slices of dark rye bread topped with white cream cheese and pink smoked salmon, arranged on a ceramic plate with fresh kiwi slices fanned on the side, morning sunlight, minimalist plating
day_of_steps: Toast 2 slices (Diego) or 1.5 slices (Diana) rye or sourdough bread lightly
Spread 30g (Diego) or 25g (Diana) cream cheese on warm toast
Layer 50g (Diego) or 40g (Diana) smoked salmon on top
Serve with 2 fresh kiwis (Diego) or 1.5 kiwis (Diana), peeled and sliced

meals.name: Walnuts & Pear
meals.image_prompt: handful of cracked walnuts in a small wooden bowl next to a fresh ripe pear on a white ceramic plate, natural light from window
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw walnuts into small bowl
Slice 1 ripe pear, serve alongside

meals.name: Asian Chicken Stir-Fry with Bok Choy, Sesame & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: wok-style chicken stir-fry with tender bok choy and carrots, steamed brown rice on the side, drizzled with sesame oil, topped with sesame seeds, served in a white bowl, warm kitchen light
prep_steps: Cook 120g dry brown rice in 240ml water, cool and portion
Cut 600g chicken breast into bite-sized pieces
Mince garlic, slice 500g bok choy, julienne 200g carrots
Stir-fry chicken in 1.5 tbsp olive oil at high heat 8 min until cooked, cool and portion
Stir-fry bok choy and carrots in 1 tbsp sesame oil for 4 min, season with soy sauce and ginger, cool and portion
day_of_steps: Reheat 160g (Diego) or 130g (Diana) cooked chicken in wok 2 min
Add reheated stir-fried bok choy and carrots, toss 1 min
Portion cooked brown rice into bowl
Top with chicken and vegetables, drizzle 0.5 tsp (Diego) or 0.3 tsp (Diana) sesame oil, sprinkle sesame seeds

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Almonds & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: ceramic bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with sliced almonds and fresh blueberries, on a marble countertop, soft natural light

Top with 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) almonds and 60g (Diego) or 50g (Diana) blueberries

meals.name: Lean Beef & Herb Meatballs with Tomato Sauce & Whole-Grain Pasta
meals.image_prompt: plate of whole-wheat pasta with lean beef meatballs in a vibrant tomato sauce, garnished with fresh basil and a light parmesan shaving, warm kitchen lighting
prep_steps: Mix 550g lean beef mince with 30g grated onion, 1 egg, garlic, dried oregano, salt, pepper
Roll into 16 meatballs, bake at 180°C for 14 min until cooked through, cool and portion
Sauté minced garlic in 1 tbsp olive oil, add 400g tomato paste + 200ml water, simmer 8 min with basil and oregano, cool and portion
Cook 200g dry whole-grain pasta al dente, cool and portion
day_of_steps: Reheat 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) cooked pasta in 180°C for 3 min
Reheat 5 (Diego) or 4 (Diana) meatballs + sauce 180°C for 4 min
Plate pasta, top with meatballs and sauce, garnish with basil

meals.image_prompt: pan-seared salmon fillet with crispy skin, golden roasted asparagus spears, creamy roasted sweet potato wedge, lemon slice on top, white plate, warm kitchen light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Cut 350g sweet potatoes into wedges, toss with 1 tbsp olive oil and paprika, roast 20 min until tender
Trim 400g fresh asparagus, toss with 0.5 tbsp olive oil and thyme, roast alongside sweet potato for final 12 min
Pat dry 2 salmon fillets (Diego 160g, Diana 130g) with paper towel
